mapper.select:
SELECT FILE_ID , FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , FILE_PTRN , FILE_ETNS , FILE_SIZE
, DEL_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , AMNN_USER_ID = #{amnnUserId} , AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID , FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , FILE_PTRN , FILE_ETNS , FILE_SIZE , DEL_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M WHERE UPPER(FILE_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{fileNm}) || '%' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC
